service_options.name: Commercial voiceover – up to 60 seconds (1 hour session)
service_options.description: Studio-recorded commercial voiceover for scripts up to 60 seconds, including basic processing and one round of pickups within 7 days.

service_options.name: Commercial voiceover – up to 30 seconds (0.5 hour session)
service_options.description: Short-form commercial read ideal for pre-roll, social promos, and quick broadcast tags. Includes live direction via Zoom or Source-Connect if needed.

service_options.name: On-camera self-tape – 2 scenes (2 hours session)
service_options.description: Two scripted scenes, on-camera coaching, multiple takes, and delivery of polished self-tape files with basic color and sound balancing.

service_options.name: On-camera self-tape – 1 scene (1 hour session)
service_options.description: Single scene self-tape with coaching, a variety of takes, and quick-turnaround delivery of audition-ready footage.

service_options.name: Script consultation – 60 minutes
service_options.description: Live consultation to refine scripts, casting specs, and performance direction notes for both voiceover and on-camera projects.

testimonials.quote_short: Their read elevated our regional retail TV spots into something that felt truly national.
testimonials.quote_full: Their read elevated our regional retail TV spots into something that felt truly national. We threw a lot of last-minute script changes at them during the session, and they rolled with every adjustment without losing energy or clarity. The client specifically called out the voiceover as a key reason the campaign outperformed benchmarks. We will absolutely be bringing them back for future brand work.
testimonials.project_description: Regional retail TV campaign with multiple 30-second spots.

testimonials.quote_short: Fast, flexible, and right on brand for our fintech radio launch.
testimonials.quote_full: Fast, flexible, and right on brand for our fintech radio launch. We needed a voice that felt confident but still approachable, and they nailed it on the very first take. Our clients were listening in live and immediately relaxed once they heard the tone and pacing. Turnaround on pickups was same-day, which helped us meet a tough media deadline.
testimonials.project_description: National radio and streaming audio launch for a fintech app.

testimonials.quote_short: They brought a warm, lived-in feel to our streaming bundle campaign that testing audiences loved.
testimonials.quote_full: They brought a warm, lived-in feel to our streaming bundle campaign that testing audiences loved. We tried several different read styles during the session, from playful to more grounded, and they shifted gears instantly each time. The final cut felt like a real person talking to a friend, not a typical announcer. Our brand team has already requested them by name for the next round of creative.
testimonials.project_description: Streaming TV and online video campaign for a home entertainment bundle.

testimonials.quote_short: Our DTC subscription client saw a noticeable lift after we swapped in their new VO.
testimonials.quote_full: Our DTC subscription client saw a noticeable lift after we swapped in their new VO. We ran an A/B test with the previous spot and the new version featuring their read, and the new creative drove a significantly higher click-through rate. They offered subtle performance tweaks that made the script sound less scripted and more like natural conversation. It felt like having a creative partner in the booth, not just a hired voice.
testimonials.project_description: Direct-to-consumer subscription TV and OTT spots with multiple language cutdowns.

testimonials.quote_short: For a social-first campaign, their timing and sense of rhythm were spot on.
testimonials.quote_full: For a social-first campaign, their timing and sense of rhythm were spot on. We needed a voice that could hit punchlines in under six seconds without sounding rushed, and they locked into that timing almost immediately. They also gave us a range of alt reads that made the editing process much smoother. The client has already asked us to book them again for the next round of UGC-style spots.
testimonials.project_description: Short-form online video and UGC-style ads for a lifestyle app.

testimonials.quote_short: They became the new brand voice for our client after a single global refresh campaign.
testimonials.quote_full: They became the new brand voice for our client after a single global refresh campaign. We were juggling multiple time zones, four cutdown lengths, and rapid script iterations, and they kept every session calm, focused, and productive. Their ability to subtly adjust tone for different markets, while staying on-brand, impressed both our creative and strategy teams. It's rare to find a talent who can balance precision with genuine warmth the way they do.
testimonials.project_description: Global brand refresh with online video, radio, and paid social cutdowns.
testimonials.contact_title: Executive Creative Director, Sunrise Brand Studio

testimonials.quote_short: Outstanding partner on our multi-market launch  the VO tied the whole campaign together.
testimonials.quote_full: Outstanding partner on our multi-market launch  the VO tied the whole campaign together. We had separate edits for CTV, YouTube, and paid social, each with slightly different scripts and CTAs. They maintained consistency while still tailoring the energy to each placement. They also recorded pronunciation guides and alt line readings that saved us from having to schedule an extra session. Our client immediately extended the campaign based on the early results.
testimonials.project_description: Multi-market digital and CTV launch for a global wellness brand.

testimonials.quote_short: Their grounded, authoritative tone was exactly what our B2B client needed for a brand refresh.
testimonials.quote_full: Their grounded, authoritative tone was exactly what our B2B client needed for a brand refresh. The scripts were dense with technical language, but they made every line sound clear and human. Our client commented that this was the first time their messaging felt "like something people would actually listen to." From scheduling to final delivery, the process was smooth and ahead of deadline.
testimonials.project_description: B2B brand refresh campaign with web video, paid social, and conference sizzle reels.

testimonials.quote_short: They delivered a cinematic trailer voice that made our indie game feel triple-A.
testimonials.quote_full: They delivered a cinematic trailer voice that made our indie game feel triple-A. We pushed for a big, theatrical sound without drifting into parody, and they found that sweet spot right away. During the session they offered several character-based alts that we ended up using in social teasers. Their attention to story and stakes really helped sell the world of our game.
testimonials.project_description: Announcement trailer and social teasers for an indie action-adventure game.

testimonials.quote_short: Their range gave us multiple compelling NPCs from a single session.
testimonials.quote_full: Their range gave us multiple compelling NPCs from a single session. We booked them for one primary role in our RPG and ended up casting them in four additional supporting characters on the spot. They maintained clear vocal distinctions between each character, even across multiple pickup sessions. Our players have already singled out those performances as a highlight in community forums.
testimonials.project_description: Character voices for a story-driven fantasy RPG, including main and supporting roles.

testimonials.quote_short: The calm, reassuring tone in our patient guides made complex information feel manageable.
testimonials.quote_full: The calm, reassuring tone in our patient guides made complex information feel manageable. We produce a lot of educational content, and we needed a voice that sounded both knowledgeable and compassionate. They were careful with medical terminology and willing to re-record lines until our clinical team was fully comfortable. Feedback from patient advisory panels has been overwhelmingly positive.
testimonials.project_description: Patient-facing video guides and on-hold messaging for a healthcare network.
testimonials.contact_title: Director of Patient Engagement, Greenleaf Healthcare Group

testimonials.quote_short: On our micro-budget feature, they brought a level of professionalism that raised the whole project.
testimonials.quote_full: On our micro-budget feature, they brought a level of professionalism that raised the whole project. From ADR sessions to a last-minute trailer VO, they showed up prepared, focused, and collaborative. They were open to experimenting with different emotional approaches and always had strong instincts about what the story needed. Several festival programmers mentioned the polish of the sound and VO in their feedback.
testimonials.project_description: ADR, narration, and trailer voiceover for an independent drama feature.

testimonials.quote_short: They gave our automotive spot energy without tipping into shouty territory.
testimonials.quote_full: They gave our automotive spot energy without tipping into shouty territory. The client wanted excitement but was wary of the classic "yelling car ad" sound. We worked through a few tonal options in the session, and they quickly honed in on a confident, modern read that everyone loved. The final mix sounded polished and premium, which helped our regional spot stand out against national competitors.
testimonials.project_description: Regional automotive TV and online video campaign with multiple cutdowns.

testimonials.quote_short: They were a thoughtful, engaging host who kept our interview series flowing.
testimonials.quote_full: They were a thoughtful, engaging host who kept our interview series flowing. Many of our guests were not used to being on mic, and they did an excellent job putting people at ease while still getting to the heart of each topic. Their self-recorded audio sounded broadcast quality with minimal direction from our end. We regularly receive compliments on the professionalism of the show.
testimonials.project_description: Narration and hosting for an independent interview podcast series.
